title: Cape Cacher
description: Cape Cacher is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that allows players to cache the capes of users in their current server and see what cape they have on their player in real-time. This mod can help improve the accuracy of cape profiles by contributing to the datab
body:
Cape Cacher is a Fabric mod for Minecraft that allows players to cache the capes of users in their current server and see what cape they have on their player in real-time. This mod can help improve the accuracy of cape profiles by contributing to the database on [capes.me](https://capes.me/), a website that offers the most accurate cape profiles in Minecraft.

To use Cape Cacher, players can simply install the mod, and it will automatically cache the capes of users on the server.

Overall, Cape Cacher is a useful tool for players who want to keep track of the capes worn by other players on their server and contribute to improving the accuracy of cape information on capes.me.
